label: Faith
description: Trusting Christ enough to actually act — not just agree in your head.

label: Repentance
description: Turning back to God and away from stuff you know is wrong, through Christ.

label: Baptism
description: Going under the water as a real promise to God — the way you enter the covenant path.

label: Gift of the Holy Ghost
description: What you get after baptism — help to change, guidance, and a clearer sense of what's true.

label: Enduring to the End
description: Not bailing on the covenant path when life gets long and messy.
